description: Central overview for admin showing key metrics, conversion rates, and quick-access views for leads, enrollments, programs, calendar, and communications.

screens.description: Main admin landing page with summary metrics and quick access to key areas

features.description: Show lead counts by source, conversion rates, active enrollments, and payment status summary

requirements.description: Dashboard displays: total leads by source (Facebook, Google, Website), lead-to-trial conversion rate, trial-to-enrollment conversion rate, total active enrollments, payment status summary (pending, paid, partial, waived counts)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All metrics are computed from current data; dashboard refreshes on page load; numbers match actual record counts

requirements.description: Metrics are displayed as cards or widgets with clear labels and values
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each metric has a label, value, and optional trend indicator; layout is clean and scannable

features.description: Dashboard provides direct links to key views: recent leads, upcoming trials, pending payments

requirements.description: Dashboard shows shortcut sections: 5 most recent leads, upcoming trials this week, enrollments with pending payments
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each section shows a compact list with clickable items that navigate to the full detail view

business_rules.rule: Dashboard metrics are calculated in real-time from current data, not pre-aggregated snapshots
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Creating a new lead or enrollment is reflected in dashboard metrics on next page load

business_rules.rule: Dashboard is the default landing page for admin after login
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Admin login redirects to dashboard; sidebar highlights dashboard as active
